description_long: This airplane features a sleek, futuristic design with a sharply pointed nose and a wide, swept-back wingspan that gives it a manta ray-like silhouette. The wings are sharply angled and appear to have a slight anhedral configuration, contributing to its aggressive, high-speed appearance. The fuselage is streamlined and tapers smoothly toward the rear, where a prominent vertical stabilizer rises above the tail section. The surface is finished in a dark, glossy material with subtle blue and black hues, and there are visible engine nacelles integrated into the rear of the fuselage. The landing gear is visible beneath the main body, suggesting a tricycle configuration. The cockpit is seamlessly blended into the forward section of the fuselage, with a dark, tinted canopy that appears to be single-seat and fully enclosed.
description: A sleek, futuristic airplane with swept-back wings, a pointed nose, and a glossy dark finish. It features a prominent vertical stabilizer, integrated rear engines, and a streamlined, single-seat cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, swept-back wings and pointed nose, emphasizing the manta ray-like silhouette and central vertical stabilizer.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sharply angled wings, rear engine nacelles, and the smooth tapering of the fuselage toward the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the anhedral wing configuration, dual engine outlets, and the prominent vertical stabilizer above the tail.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the sleek profile, integrated engines, and the streamlined cockpit canopy.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, anhedral wings and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Single vertical stabilizer with a conventional tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat, fully enclosed cockpit with a dark, streamlined canopy.
